1.gl: properly, to glitter from afar, i.e. to be eminent (as a superintendent, especially of the Temple services and its music); to be permanent
1.kj: excel, chief musician (singer), oversee(-r), set forward.
1.dv: a primitive root;  also as denominative from H5331 (נֶצַח)

1.gl: properly, instrumental music; by implication, a stringed instrument; by extension, a poem set to music; specifically, an epigram
David, the youngest son of Jesse
1.dv: rarely (fully); דָּוִיד; from the same as H1730 (דּוֹד); loving;

1.gl: properly, instrumental music; by implication, a poem set to notes

2.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
2.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

2.gl: narrow; (as a noun) a tight place (usually figuratively, i.e. trouble); also a pebble ; (transitive) an opponent (as crowding)
2.kj: adversary, afflicted(-tion), anguish, close, distress, enemy, flint, foe, narrow, small, sorrow, strait, tribulation, trouble.

3.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)

3.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

3.dv: or מַה; or מָ; or מַ; also מֶה; a primitive particle;

3.gl: to search out (by any method, specifically in worship or prayer); by implication, to strive after
3.kj: ask, beg, beseech, desire, enquire, get, make inquisition, procure, (make) request, require, seek (for).

3.gl: properly, weight, but only figuratively in a good sense, splendor or copiousness
emptiness; figuratively, a worthless thing; adverbially, in vain
3.kj: empty, to no purpose, (in) vain (thing), vanity.

5.kj: cease, be cut down (off), forbear, hold peace, quiet self, rest, be silent, keep (put to) silence, be (stand) still, tarry, wait.

5.gl: the heart (as the most interior organ);
5.kj: [phrase] bethink themselves, breast, comfortably, courage, ((faint), (tender-) heart(-ed), midst, mind, [idiom] unawares, understanding.
5.dv: from H3823 (לָבַב); used also like H3820 (לֵב)

5.gl: not (the qualified negation, used as a deprecative); once (Job 24:25) as a noun, nothing
5.kj: nay, neither, [phrase] never, no, nor, not, nothing (worth), rather than.

5.gl: to quiver (with any violent emotion, especially anger or fear)
5.kj: be afraid, stand in awe, disquiet, fall out, fret, move, provoke, quake, rage, shake, tremble, trouble, be wroth.

6.gl: figuratively, to trust, be confident or sure
6.kj: be bold (confident, secure, sure), careless (one, woman), put confidence, (make to) hope, (put, make to) trust.
6.dv: a primitive root; properly, to hide for refuge (but not so precipitately as H2620 (חָסָה));

6.gl: the right (natural, moral or legal); also (abstractly) equity or (figuratively) prosperity
6.kj: [idiom] even, ([idiom] that which is altogether) just(-ice), (un-)right(-eous) (cause, -ly, -ness).

6.gl: properly, a slaughter, i.e. the flesh of an animal; by implication, a sacrifice (the victim or the act)
Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
6.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

6.gl: to slaughter an animal (usually in sacrifice)
